title: ozothamnus costatifructus
intro: Ozothamnus costatifructus, also known as the varnished sedge or varnished scrub, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ozothamnus costatifructus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often consumed as a tea or taken as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
